evals.prompt: I just finished a refactor of the auth flow. Do an adversarial review on it before I ship -- try to break it.

assertions.description: The skill instructs the reviewer subagent to receive the FULL diff (or read changed files end-to-end), not a prose summary.
assertions.check: SKILL.md body explicitly forbids summary-only review and requires full diff / file reads in Phase 1 setup and Phase 2 prompt template.

assertions.description: The skill RECOMMENDS opus-class model but does not HARD-CODE it as required.
assertions.check: SKILL.md uses 'recommended', 'prefer', or 'recommendation, not a hard requirement' language around model choice; does not state opus is mandatory.

assertions.description: The description includes explicit 'do not trigger for routine code review' guidance and routes to code-review:code-review.
assertions.check: Frontmatter description contains a 'Do NOT trigger' clause referencing routine code review and pointing to code-review:code-review.

evals.prompt: Red-team this new harness Stop hook -- I want a hardening pass before I commit it.

assertions.description: Reviewer subagent prompt template instructs it to read the full diff and tests, not a summary.
assertions.check: Phase 2 prompt template Context block says 'read the full diff' and 'do NOT rely on a summary'.

assertions.description: Skill notes the agent-model gate is environment-dependent, not assumed to exist.
assertions.check: Phase 2 says 'if your environment has agent-model gating hooks' (conditional) rather than asserting the user's CLAUDE.md hook exists.

assertions.description: Description disambiguates from verification-before-completion and brainstorming.
assertions.check: Frontmatter description names superpowers:verification-before-completion and superpowers:brainstorming as alternatives that should be used instead in non-adversarial cases.
